goal_notes: The prototype was successfully built iteratively over multiple sessions (Feb 13 - Mar 12, 2026). Major milestones: initial prototype creation, background image refinement (4 iterations before correct approach), dolphin logo sizing (6 iterations), LLM-based recommendations via edge function, dataset integration with images, feedback-driven refinement, About Us page, and star ratings. Two notable bugs were found and fixed: duplicate React keys causing render issues, and UID-image mismatches from LLM responses. The collection is retraced from chat history, so some intermediate steps within multi-tool agent responses are condensed. This lowers confidence from 75% to 65%.
learning: When building a prototype iteratively with a user, expect many small cosmetic adjustments (logo sizing, text changes, color tweaks). Group these efficiently but trace them faithfully. The most valuable work happens when adding backend AI integration (edge functions, LLM calls) and debugging data integrity issues (UID mismatches between AI responses and image mappings). Always enforce strict data constraints in LLM prompts when the output maps to a fixed dataset.
system_prompt: You are Lovable, an AI editor that builds and modifies software, primarily web applications. You chat with users on the left panel while they see live code changes in the preview on the right. Technology Stack: React 18, Vite 5, Tailwind CSS v3, TypeScript 5. Backend: Lovable Cloud (Supabase). You can create edge functions, manage database migrations, generate images, and deploy changes automatically.
task: Build a mobile-first prototype for an AI-powered laptop shopping assistant called Dolly, with a guided quiz flow, LLM-based recommendations from a real laptop dataset, iterative UI refinements, and feedback-driven recommendation updates.

goal_notes: Goal was achieved (Pollard's rho implemented with strong benchmark speedup), but many iterative corrections were needed to balance deterministic correctness and performance for large integers, reducing trace confidence due retraced compression.
learning: For iterative algorithm work, prove performance on each revision while explicitly separating deterministic guarantees from probabilistic shortcuts to avoid regressions across correctness and runtime.
system_prompt: You are an AI assistant accessed via an API.
task: Implement Pollard's rho factorization in factorisation.py, preserve slow_trial_division, and repeatedly refine correctness/performance through user review while keeping benchmark speedup >=10x.

agent_config.internet_access: restricted unless approved for shell; web tool available

goal_notes: The user's task was achieved: a new Desktop BRAF V600E docking workflow was built end-to-end, Vina was run successfully, outputs were written into the requested folder structure, and the result was validated against the 3OG7 co-crystal before the conversation moved into future-method planning. The most important pivots were recovering the Meeko dependency stack after the initial pip failure, using the co-crystallized ligand rather than a generic kinase assumption to define the box, and comparing the docked pose back to the crystal contacts. The main limitation is that the validation remained short of a final exact atom-mapped heavy-atom RMSD or MD stability test.
learning: For kinase docking, using the co-crystallized ligand geometry to define and then validate the search box is more reliable than carrying over assumptions from a previous target family. The actual pocket shape, chain context, and residue envelope should be measured from the structure before prep decisions are trusted.
system_prompt: You are an AI assistant accessed via an API.
task: Set up a docking run for BRAF V600E mutant kinase (PDB 3OG7) against vemurafenib (PubChem CID 42611257). Same pipeline approach — download, convert to PDBQT, write config, dock and use auto-dock vina (already installed at C:\Program Files (x86)\The Scripps Research Institute\Vina). Create a new folder in desktop – then build and use this pipeline structure — receptors/, ligands/, configuration/, output/ folders. This is a different kinase family from the previous HER2 target — pay attention to how the binding pocket shape and size differ. Before each action, describe the current state in concrete detail — atom counts, coordinate ranges, specific residues at the binding site, column formats. When choosing grid box dimensions, explain your reasoning for the specific values and what alternatives you considered.

goal_notes: Docking pipeline fully functional. Ligand docked to correct binding site on EGFR. Orientation slightly off vs experimental PDB pose due to simplified charge assignment and atom typing (no proper Gasteiger charges). Multiple iterations needed to fix PDBQT format issues (column alignment, END vs TER, torsion tree nesting).
system_prompt: You are an interactive agent that helps users with software engineering tasks. Use the instructions and tools available to assist the user. Platform: win32, Shell: bash, OS: Windows 11 Home.
task: Create a batch script for combinatorial molecular docking using AutoDock Vina. Convert protein (PDB 1M17 CIF) and ligand (PubChem CID 176870 SDF) files to PDBQT format, generate a docking configuration file based on the co-crystallized ligand binding site, set up the folder structure, and run the docking pipeline locally on Windows.

goal_notes: User satisfied with workflow and recalibration. No process data captured this session -- user deferred running shots. Workflow + pre-flight checklist + parameter ranking delivered. Next step: user runs Step 0 baseline and reports numbers.

human_feedback.back_pressure_challenge: User correctly challenged back pressure being framed as auxiliary. Agent recalibrated -- BP is top-tier for shear-sensitive PP with mechanical-property goals.

learning: For unfilled PP gears with pin-gate-at-hub geometry, the dominant defect mode is internal hub voids. Counter with: pack pressure in upper datasheet range, pack time >= gate-seal time, mould temp warm enough to keep hub fluid until pack arrives. When the optimisation goal includes mechanical properties, back pressure and melt temperature rise from auxiliary to top-tier importance because PP is shear-sensitive: excess recovery shear degrades molecular weight, which directly reduces tensile strength, toughness, creep resistance, and gear-tooth wear life.
skills: Forsy submission contract (fetched via WebFetch from https://formachine.forsy.ai/skill.md)

goal_notes: The sampler was implemented with log-space acceptance logic, benchmarked, and met the acceptance-rate and variance thresholds.
learning: For numerical-stability-constrained MCMC tasks, implementing acceptance checks entirely in log-space and validating immediately with the provided benchmark is the fastest way to confirm both correctness and exploration behavior.

goal_notes: The user’s legal-evaluation request was completed in one turn. Pivotal steps were the official Ontario ESA research for 2026 public job-posting obligations and the case-law research on clear and unequivocal resignation/rescission. The trace is retraced from conversation/tool history rather than live instrumentation, so timestamps are unavailable and some long tool outputs are excerpted rather than reproduced in full.
learning: For current legal-risk analysis, especially where recent employment-standards amendments may control the answer, verify both official government guidance and case-law doctrine before applying facts; if primary case pages are inaccessible, fall back to reliable accessible mirrors while clearly grounding statutory points in official sources.

Full hidden system/developer instructions are not included.
task: Evaluate, under Ontario law as of May 11, 2026, whether a Toronto automotive-parts manufacturer mishandled a CFO’s heat-of-the-moment resignation, attempted rescission, and the public posting of the CFO job opening using an AI candidate sorting system.
